[Verse]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch] 
Well the truth, well it hurts to say [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch] 
I'm gonna pack up my bags and I'm gonna go away [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch] 
I'm gonna split, I can't stand it [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch] 
And the truth I won't fight it [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch] 
when the love starts burnin' you got to do what's right [/tab]

[Chorus] 
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch] 
Woah lover, lover, lover, you don't treat me no good no more [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch] 
Woah lover, lover, lover, you don't treat me no good no more [/tab]
 
[Verse]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch] 
Well the truth, yea it hurts to say [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] 
Now all you do is treat me cold [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]

[Chorus] 
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                                               [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                                       [ch]C[/ch]

Oh woman, oh woman, you know I love you, so mean to me baby I'm walkin' out the door [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch] 
Lover, oh lover   [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                             [ch]C[/ch]

Lover, oh lover [/tab]
